name: project-context-pack
description: Initialize, use, update, and review a lightweight project .context memory pack. Helps AI agents maintain persistent project awareness across conversations.
author: context-pack

skills.name: init-context
skills.description: Initialize a project .context memory pack by asking the user about their project

skills.name: use-context
skills.description: Read and use the project .context memory pack efficiently

skills.name: update-context
skills.description: Surgically update .context files after completing work

skills.name: review-context
skills.description: Audit .context files for staleness and accuracy
